name: HooYu
description: HooYu combines ID document verification, face-match biometrics, database checks and digital footprint analysis into a customer onboarding journey used by banks, gaming operators and fintechs.

seo.title: HooYu — KYC / KYB / AML API
seo.meta_description: HooYu: HooYu combines ID document verification, face-match biometrics, database checks and digital footprint analysis into a customer onboarding journey used by

when_to_use: ID document and face match for gaming operator KYC (UKGC)
Digital footprint analysis for enhanced due diligence
Bank KYC onboarding with database and document fusion
Biometric verification for PSD2 SCA re-authentication
Customer identity journey builder for regulated industries

pros: Blends document, biometric and database checks
Digital footprint signals add passive verification
Used by UK banks and gaming operators
cons: UK-centric data sources limit global usefulness
Mitek acquisition has created product overlap
SDK and docs feel less modern than newer rivals
Digital footprint data raises privacy concerns
review.verdict: UK-centric onboarding journey tool now under Mitek, solid locally but check the roadmap before buying.
review.best_for: UK banks, gaming operators and fintechs wanting a layered onboarding journey with database checks
review.not_for: Global or US-first teams needing modern APIs and broad international coverage beyond the UK

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
